_comment_top: Spine v3 — Google Workspace IdP brokering preset. Day-0 wizard substitutes placeholders. {{HOSTED_DOMAIN}} restricts brokering to a single Workspace domain (e.g. 'acme.com'); leave blank for any-Google-account (Founder tier only — discouraged Enterprise).

_comment_placeholders.{{HOSTED_DOMAIN}}: Workspace domain to restrict to (e.g. 'acme.com') OR empty
_comment_placeholders.{{CLIENT_ID}}: OAuth 2.0 Client ID from GCP console (apps.googleusercontent.com)
